summary: Backend: 14/14 tests pass (health, auth, patients, medicines CRUD + trolley sync, doses today/list/stats/patch, trolley, TTS). Frontend: Login + Dashboard + Schedule + History + Profile flows all functional with seeded data and no console/page errors. TTS endpoint returns valid base64 audio (~5s). Voice preview triggers OK.

issues: Console deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), Image style.resizeMode deprecated (use props.resizeMode). Cosmetic only - no functional impact.

action_items: Optional: Update Image components to use resizeMode prop instead of style.resizeMode to clean up Expo warnings.
Optional: Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow for RN Web compatibility.
Optional: Update expo-audio, expo-linear-gradient, expo-secure-store to versions Expo SDK recommends (cosmetic warning at startup).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False; acceptable for Bearer-token mobile auth but tighten origins for production.
seed_data() is idempotent for users (admin/patient) and self-heals admin password, matching playbook expectations.
All MongoDB queries exclude _id via projection; responses are JSON-serializable.
JWT secret loaded from env; no hardcoded creds. bcrypt hashing used (verified $2b$ format).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Tests rely on backend startup auto-seed (admin@trolley.health, patient@trolley.health, Aarav Sharma + 3 medicines + history doses).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab labels render UPPERCASE (SCHEDULE/HISTORY/PROFILE) - use page.get_by_text('SCHEDULE', exact=True). All key testIDs work. TTS takes ~5s. Backend URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env.
rca_of_issue: N/A - first iteration, no bugs found.
